UpdateSourceArgs: -c "set -eu; cd \"{{$FullRootDir}}\"; PROTON_DIR=\"{{$FullRootDir}}.proton\"; COMPAT_DIR=\"$PROTON_DIR/compatdata/2465200\"; STEAM_DIR=\"{{$FullBaseDir}}.steam\"; mkdir -p \"$PROTON_DIR\" \"$COMPAT_DIR\" \"$STEAM_DIR/steam\" \"$STEAM_DIR/steam/ubuntu12_32\" \"$STEAM_DIR/steam/ubuntu12_64\" \"$STEAM_DIR/sdk32\" \"$STEAM_DIR/sdk64\" \"{{$FullBaseDir}}.config/protonfixes\"; if [ -x \"$PROTON_DIR/proton\" ]; then echo 'Proton GE already installed (proton executable present)'; if [ -f \"{{$FullRootDir}}linux32/steamclient.so\" ]; then cp -f \"{{$FullRootDir}}linux32/steamclient.so\" \"$STEAM_DIR/sdk32/\"; cp -f \"{{$FullRootDir}}linux32/steamclient.so\" \"$STEAM_DIR/steam/ubuntu12_32/\"; fi; if [ -f \"{{$FullRootDir}}linux64/steamclient.so\" ]; then cp -f \"{{$FullRootDir}}linux64/steamclient.so\" \"$STEAM_DIR/sdk64/\"; cp -f \"{{$FullRootDir}}linux64/steamclient.so\" \"$STEAM_DIR/steam/ubuntu12_64/\"; fi; exit 0; fi; echo 'Checking latest Proton GE version'; ProtonVersion=$(wget -qO- https://api.github.com/repos/GloriousEggroll/proton-ge-custom/releases/latest | grep '\"tag_name\"' | head -n1 | cut -d '\"' -f4); if [ -z \"$ProtonVersion\" ]; then echo 'Failed to detect Proton GE version'; exit 1; fi; if [ -f \"$PROTON_DIR/version\" ] && grep -qx \"$ProtonVersion\" \"$PROTON_DIR/version\"; then echo 'Latest Proton GE already installed'; exit 0; fi; echo \"Downloading Proton GE: $ProtonVersion\"; TMP_DIR=$(mktemp -d); ARCHIVE=\"$TMP_DIR/proton.tar.gz\"; wget -qO \"$ARCHIVE\" \"https://github.com/GloriousEggroll/proton-ge-custom/releases/download/$ProtonVersion/$ProtonVersion.tar.gz\"; find \"$PROTON_DIR\" -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 ! -name compatdata -exec rm -rf {} +; tar -xzf \"$ARCHIVE\" -C \"$PROTON_DIR\" --strip-components=1; rm -rf \"$TMP_DIR\"; chmod +x \"$PROTON_DIR/proton\"; printf '%s\n' \"$ProtonVersion\" > \"$PROTON_DIR/version\"; echo 'Proton GE installed'; if [ -f \"{{$FullRootDir}}linux32/steamclient.so\" ]; then cp -f \"{{$FullRootDir}}linux32/steamclient.so\" \"$STEAM_DIR/sdk32/\"; cp -f \"{{$FullRootDir}}linux32/steamclient.so\" \"$STEAM_DIR/steam/ubuntu12_32/\"; fi; if [ -f \"{{$FullRootDir}}linux64/steamclient.so\" ]; then cp -f \"{{$FullRootDir}}linux64/steamclient.so\" \"$STEAM_DIR/sdk64/\"; cp -f \"{{$FullRootDir}}linux64/steamclient.so\" \"$STEAM_DIR/steam/ubuntu12_64/\"; fi"
